name: Alabama Board of Electrical Contractors Licensee Search
termsReviewNotes: The board's official site and linked public roster were reviewed; no source-specific reuse terms page was confirmed.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official roster before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Alabama Electrical Contractor, Journeyman, and Provisional Electrical license records exposed by the public roster
knownExclusions: This source is scoped to credentials regulated by the Alabama Board of Electrical Contractors.
Residential home builder, general contractor, plumbing, HVAC, local permits, and municipal registrations are outside this source entry.
Solar coverage is limited to electrical work and does not replace the residential home builder requirements documented by HBLB.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access must respect the vendor-hosted public roster and prefer an official export if one becomes available.
publicRecordsNotes: Official electrical-license lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that an authorization or other credential does not exist.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed. The board links to a vendor-hosted interactive roster.
researchNotes: The official board site describes a complete roster of electrical contractors, journeymen, and provisional licensees. Alabama general-contractor materials require the corresponding state electrical card for electrical classifications.
maintainerNotes: Do not extend this source beyond electrical credentials or imply complete solar-contractor coverage.

researchEvidence.note: The official board site links a complete roster search for licensed Electrical Contractors, Journeymen, and Provisional Electrical Licensees.
The linked public search exposes license number, company, city, and license-type fields for electrical credentials.

blocker.summary: An official vendor-hosted lookup exists, but no stable documented machine-readable interface or reuse terms have been adapter-reviewed.
